# Content Task

## Content Goal

Describe the public content to add or revise.

## Page Or Area

Examples: home, QR landing page, biography, research, portfolio, contact.

## Approved Source Material

List only public or explicitly approved sources.

## Privacy Review

- [ ] No private phone numbers or private addresses.
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, `.env` files, contracts, or private documents.
- [ ] No unpublished research data or confidential manuscripts.
- [ ] No unsupported claims.

## Language

- [ ] English
- [ ] Russian
- [ ] Kazakh
